Hiring a great CPA is hard.
We make it easy.
Our CPA services are unmatched in the tax industry. We proactively tax plan. We guarantee results. We prioritize communication, and thousands trust our CPAs for tax advice. This is what you can expect from our services at My CPA Coach:
Guaranteed tax savings.
Yes, we are that good. If our tax planning service does not identify tax savings in excess of our fee, we will refund your money.
Top-notch Qualifications
You deserve to work with the best. All of our tax services are led by licensed Certified Public Accountants - the highest designation in our industry.
Proactive 1-on-1 Coaching
No more procrastination on your taxes. Our CPAs provide year-round support to ensure your taxes and bookkeeping are in excellent shape.
Highly Responsive Support
No more waiting weeks for your CPA to reply to you. We prioritize client communication and respond to most inquiries within 1-2 business days.
Schedule your free consultation today.
Save thousands of dollars by using the Best CPA services in America.
Contact Us
Learn the tax game yourself.
Save money and enroll into our self-guided course to learn how to reduce your own taxes. In this course, we teach top tax strategies that our CPAs typically charge thousands of dollars for. You can learn them for just a few hundred dollars.
Enroll in our Tax Savers Course
Learn our tax planning framework to reduce your own taxes.

Important Disclosures:
Tax Planning Guarantee: We will refund up to 100% of our tax planning fee upon all of the following conditions being present: 1) Your plan does not identify at least double the price of the plan in estimated tax savings 2) Your business earns over $100,000 per year in revenue 3) You provided all required information to create your tax plan.
Tax Preparation Guarantee: We will refund up to 100% of our tax preparation service for any interest or penalties related to the accuracy of our filing of your tax return. To be eligible for any refund, the inaccuracy on your tax return must be directly caused by our firm. Direct causes include, but are not limited to, data inserted on the tax return that does not correlate with the information provided by the Client. Inaccuracies from indirect causes are not covered by this guarantee. Indirect causes include, but are not limited to, tax return inaccuracies due to incorrect information provided by the client. This guarantee does not include interest and penalties resulting from late filings.
